name: software-architect
description: Designs scalable and highly available software architectures from a holistic perspective, guiding the technical team's direction

displayDescription.en: Designs scalable and highly available software architectures from a holistic perspective, guiding the technical team's direction
displayDescription.zh: 站在全局高度设计可扩展高可用的软件架构，为技术团队指明方向

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我们正在开发大型软件系统,需要整体架构设计和长期发展规划,请软件架构师帮我们设计可扩展的系统架构。
defaultInitPrompt.en: We are developing a large-scale software system and need overall architecture design and long-term development planning. Please, Software Architect, help us design a scalable system architecture.

quickPrompts.zh: 我们正在开发大型软件系统,需要整体架构设计和长期发展规划,请软件架构师帮我们设计可扩展的系统架构。
quickPrompts.en: We are developing a large-scale software system and need overall architecture design and long-term development planning. Please, Software Architect, help us design a scalable system architecture.

quickPrompts.zh: 制定架构演进和重构路线图
quickPrompts.en: Develop architecture evolution and refactoring roadmap

quickPrompts.zh: 评审架构方案并输出设计文档
quickPrompts.en: Review architecture plans and produce design documents
